entities.name: DAIRY FARMING
entities.description: The practice of raising dairy animals for milk production as a subsidiary occupation for farmers)

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where dairy farming is a subsidiary occupation for millions of farmers)

entities.name: RAINFED AREAS
entities.description: Areas dependent on rainfall for water, characterized by risks and uncertainties in crop production)

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops, which alone was not remunerative in rainfed areas)

entities.name: INCOME DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The strategy of diversifying income sources through dairy, crops, and allied activities to ensure risk reduction and nutritional security)

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: A positive outcome of income diversification for the farming community)

entities.name: REGULAR EMPLOYMENT
entities.description: A positive outcome of income diversification for the farming community)

entities.name: RISK REDUCTION
entities.description: A goal achieved through diversifying dairy with crops and allied activities)

entities.name: TAMIL NADU
entities.description: The specific state in India where the study on income diversification was conducted)

entities.name: SIMPSON INDEX OF DIVERSITY
entities.description: A statistical measure used to investigate the extent of income diversification)

entities.name: TOBIT REGRESSION MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to analyze the determinants of income diversification)

entities.name: ON-FARM INCOME
entities.description: Income derived from activities directly related to the farm, accounting for two-thirds of total household income)

entities.name: OFF-FARM AND NON-FARM ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Income-generating activities outside of direct farming, accounting for one-third of total household income)

entities.name: MILCH ANIMALS
entities.description: Animals kept for milk production, contributing to household diversification)

entities.name: EDUCATION
entities.description: A determinant influencing the level of income diversification)

entities.name: FAMILY SIZE
entities.description: A determinant influencing the level of income diversification)

entities.name: LANDHOLDING SIZE
entities.description: A determinant influencing the level of income diversification)

entities.name: HERD SIZE
entities.description: A determinant influencing the level of income diversification)

entities.name: PROXIMITY TO AGRICULTURAL OR ALLIED INDUSTRY
entities.description: A determinant influencing the level of income diversification)

entities.name: ACCESS TO CREDIT
entities.description: A determinant influencing the level of income diversification)

entities.name: MEMBERSHIP IN FARMER PRODUCER ORGANIZATIONS
entities.description: A determinant influencing the level of income diversification)

entities.name: CONCENTRIC APPROACH
entities.description: A proposed strategy involving targeted research and infrastructure to boost income diversification)
